criteria.description: CatalogRecord{fileID, pathHash, currentVersion, sizeBytes, status, redirectTargetIDs, parentTopicID, lastModified} encodes to and decodes from a fixed-size byte layout with no data loss for all fields, including empty/zero redirectTargetIDs.
criteria.planned_check: TestRecordEncodeDecode table-driven cases: zero-value record (empty RedirectTargetIDs, zero scalars), fully-populated record (non-zero scalars, 3 RedirectTargetIDs), and max-capacity record (MaxRedirectTargets entries). Each asserts Encode() output length == RecordEncodedSize (fixed-size) and Decode(Encode(rec)) deep-equals rec (no data loss) for every field.
